title: MANUSCRIPT WORDS

title: CHARACTER ART
synopsis: Alessia is introduced as the protagonist, born in England with a hidden connection to the magical land of Aurethos and a significant destiny.

title: CHARACTER ART
synopsis: Irienne Ardryn is identified as an ally, still fulfilling royal duties despite a personal loss, and closely connected to Liandros.

title: KNOWN LINKS

title: ENCYCLOPEDIA ARTICLE
synopsis: Elarya is described as a city of knowledge once thriving, but now declining after the Elarys family's murder and Liandros's subsequent rule.

title: ENCYCLOPEDIA ARTICLE
synopsis: Linzai is presented as the capital city of Aurethos and the Ardryn family's home, characterized by a unique layout and bustling trade.

title: ENCYCLOPEDIA ARTICLE
synopsis: Val City in the region of Valleron is revealed as a hub for trade and craftsmanship, formerly ruled by the Cavions before unification.

title: FACTION DOSSIER
synopsis: The Cavalis are identified as a secretive force originating from a hidden city.

title: FACTION DOSSIER
synopsis: The Linzai Forces are established as the largest army in Aurethos, allied with the Ardryn family.

title: FACTION DOSSIER
synopsis: The Valleron Forces are revealed as the military power of the Valleron region, allied to The Verities.

title: FACTION DOSSIER
synopsis: The Verities, founded by Irienne Ardryn, are a resistance movement aiming to reveal the truth about the Aurethi trees and democratize magic.

title: LORE ENCYCLOPEDIA
synopsis: Gates are described as a form of rapid travel requiring wealth and wand magic, highlighting their exclusivity.

title: LORE ENCYCLOPEDIA
synopsis: Aurethos is depicted as a realm once composed of independent, peaceful regions.

title: WORLD HISTORY
synopsis: The Great Star Storm brought magic & starlight to Aurethos, transforming the Startouch Mountains and initiating a new era.

title: WORLD HISTORY
synopsis: Following the Star Storm, ‘The Madness’ gripped the land, causing widespread chaos, loss, and eventually prompting the rulers to unite against the growing threat.

title: WORLD HISTORY
synopsis: The Well of Starlight in the Startouch Mountains is described as the origin of magic in Aurethos, disrupted by the Great Star Storm.
